message:
🐛 Auto-load EPG sources on first run + disable placeholder

- Add default EPG sources (epg.pw, open-epg.com) on app start
- Kick off background refresh so EPG mapping dialog has data
- Disable epg.best placeholder source by default (needs API key)
- Fix keyboard: skip key handler when search TextField has focus

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
